name: native-codex-loop
description: Reliable long-task execution using Codex Goal, evidence-driven planning, safe delegation, and independent review.

interface.longDescription: Run complex Codex implementation tasks with a single root writer, native Goal and plan state, bounded non-writing delegation, evidence-driven replanning, and a fresh isolated completion review.
defaultPrompt: Use $native-codex-loop with Goal to complete this long implementation without dropping requirements.
Use $native-codex-loop to run this refactor with bounded delegation and an independent final review.
